name: Silco (SOULMATE AU)
description:
This is the start of a life long loveletter!
*
I completely forgot to make an anyPOV of the other bot omg...ty requestor for reminding me LMAO
Some changes made to the intro message but same plot; you run a business of whatever you want, you found out Silco is your soulmate, and he is sugary sweet towards you.
(I had this written and ready to publish right when the website fucking crashed and I was SO worried that I'd lose the work 💀)
